taxonomy_v3: Engineering and Development, Software Engineering, Backend Software Engineer
core_skills: C#, DotNet platform, Distributed cloud applications, AWS, Relational databases
skill_match_scores: C#:0.0, DotNet platform:0.0, Distributed cloud applications:0.5, AWS:1.0, Relational databases:1.0
must_have_quals: A degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, or a related technical field, 3+ years of professional experience in software development, Knowledge and experience with C# and the .Net platform, Experience with development of distributed cloud applications, with AWS experience preferred, Understanding of relational databases and SQL, Basic knowledge of machine-learning application flow, Basic knowledge of Queuing technologies such as RabbitMQ, Strong problem-solving skills and the ability to troubleshoot and optimize code
preferred_quals: Experience with Python and machine-learning related python libraries, Experience with Entity Framework, A passion for learning new technologies and improving software development practices
core_responsibilities: Building and maintaining software applications that support the core business processes, Designing, developing, and implementing software solutions that are efficient, scalable, and secure, Writing clean, maintainable code and participating in code reviews, Collaborating with teams to ensure software quality and project success, Troubleshooting software issues, optimizing performance, and implementing new features in line with business needs, Collaborating in the continuous improvement of the development process and contributing to the team's growth by sharing knowledge and best practices, Developing and delivering high-quality software applications that meet business needs, Ensuring the software meets performance, security, and scalability standards, Collaborating with cross-functional teams to ensure smooth integration of software solutions
job_summary: Siemens Energy is an energy technology company with a commitment to developing the energy systems of the future. As a Backend Software Developer, you will build and maintain software applications that support core business processes, ensuring quality, efficiency, and scalability of the solutions developed.
